The '''Sharka'k Noor''' was an ancient [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] relic crafted by the Gree artisan [[Sharka'k]], who died before passing the secrets of the device to his apprentice. It was a [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming device]] made up of three short cylinders attached via small arms to a larger central cylinder, decorated with several glyphs.

The Sharka'k Noor could manipulate the geology of a planet, allowing its user to create volcanoes, earthquakes, and other such planetary changes. It was believed that this machine was created to serve as a terraforming tool as it changed a planet's core. However, due to the lack of knowledge on how the device worked, the Gree stored the artifact in their archives until it was stolen by [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Ils Ee]], who unwittingly used it on the planet [[Tujiamoor]], causing volcanic eruptions.
